document.name: User Login
document.description: Allow registered users to authenticate using username and password to access the system
document.businessValue: Secure access to protected resources and personalized user experience
acceptanceCriteria: User can log in with valid username and password
Invalid credentials show clear error message without revealing which field is wrong
Session expires after 30 minutes of inactivity
User can access 'Forgot Password' link from login page
Login attempts are rate-limited to prevent brute force attacks

flows.name: Successful Login
steps: System validates credentials against database (bcrypt comparison)
System creates session token with 30-minute expiry

flows.name: Invalid Credentials
steps: User enters incorrect username or password
System validates credentials and detects mismatch
System displays generic error: 'Invalid username or password'
User remains on login page to retry

flows.name: Account Locked
steps: User has exceeded maximum failed login attempts (5 attempts)
System displays error: 'Account temporarily locked. Try again in 15 minutes or reset password.'

flows.name: Session Already Active
steps: User is already logged in (has active session)
System redirects user directly to dashboard

collections.name: users
collections.purpose: Store user credentials and login metadata

collections.name: login_attempts
collections.purpose: Track failed login attempts for rate limiting

relationships.reason: Users must be registered before they can log in
Users may need to reset password if they forget it

implementationRisk: Password comparison must use bcrypt.compare() to prevent timing attacks
Session tokens must be cryptographically secure (use crypto.randomBytes)
Rate limiting needed to prevent brute force attacks (max 5 attempts per 15 minutes)
Generic error messages to prevent username enumeration
Session tokens must be stored securely (httpOnly cookies recommended)
testStrategy: Integration test: full login flow with database
Security test: brute force attack prevention
nonFunctionalRequirements: Session tokens must expire after 30 minutes of inactivity
Comply with OWASP authentication best practices
